commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the review found no actionable patch defect; remaining handling is normal maintainer and check gating.; Cleared: The diff only changes gateway/UI TypeScript telemetry handling and tests; it does not add dependencies, scripts, workflows, credentials handling, or new third-party code execution. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an operator-only `chat.send_timing` Gateway event with five server phases, records those phases in the Control UI `control-ui.chat.send` performance stream, and extends gateway/unit/e2e coverage.

PR surface: Source +194, Tests +229. Total +423 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a telemetry feature PR, not a bug report. Current main lacks the post-ACK `chat.send_timing` event, and the patch plus tests show the intended new behavior.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the review found no actionable patch defect; remaining handling is normal maintainer and check gating.

target.title: perf(ui): trace chat send server milestones
target.body:
## Summary
- Emit operator-only `chat.send_timing` events back to the originating Control UI connection after `chat.send` ACK.
- Add server milestones for dispatch start, model selection, agent-run start, dispatch completion, and post-dispatch completion.
- Record those milestones in the existing `control-ui.chat.send` performance event stream and cover the browser mocked Gateway path.

## Verification
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/server-methods/chat.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_LOCK=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/gateway/server-methods/chat.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- Testbox-through-Crabbox `tbx_01kt6kvpcgb27c13b5fcdpm06r`, GitHub Actions run `26881763891`, `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed`, exit 0

## Notes
- `scripts/committer` hit the known linked-worktree `ERR_PNPM_ABORTED_REMOVE_MODULES_DIR_NO_TTY` trap after staging; commit used `git commit --no-verify` after clean local and Testbox proof.
- Testbox completed and stopped; the post-completion portal sync returned 401 and did not affect the gate result.
